title: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( JUMBO SCENTED NEON )
subtitle: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( JUMBO
overview: Our M&G Jumbo Scented Neon highlighter is a versatile writing tool with a chisel tip that enables users to both highlight and underline text. It features a quick-drying ink formula that is odourless and non-toxic, making it safe and comfortable to use for extended periods. Its jumbo size allows for more extended usage, and its chisel tip allows for precise control over the width of lines.

title: M&G RETRACTABLE HIGHLIGHTER ( FLUO-CLICK ) ( NARROW CHISEL * 1.4MM )
subtitle: M&G RETRACTABLE HIGHLIGHTER (
overview: Our retractable convenience highlighter Fluo-Click is a versatile tool for highlighting important text or notes. These highlighters come in a set of four different colours and use vibrant, vivid liquid ink that stands out on the page. The chisel tip glides smoothly for clean application and consistent flow, making it easy to create precise lines or broad strokes. With their retractable design, these highlighters are easy to store and transport, making them a great choice for students, professionals, or anyone who needs to highlight important information on the go.

title: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( FLUORESCENT 880 )
subtitle: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( FLUORESCENT
overview: Our M&G Fluorescent 880 is a stylish highlighter with fluorescent colours that can add a vibrant and eye-catching touch to your notes or documents. These highlighters come in a range of bright colours such as pink, green, yellow, blue, purple and orange, which make them perfect for organizing and emphasizing important information. With their smooth and consistent flow of ink, these highlighters are easy to use and provide a precise and clean line. They are a must-have for students, artists, and anyone who wants to add a pop of colour to their work.

title: M&G SCENTED HIGHLIGHTER ( 6PCS/SET )
subtitle: M&G SCENTED HIGHLIGHTER (
overview: Our M&G Dinosaurs mini highlighters are perfect for on-the-go highlighting with their compact size and portability. This value pack includes 6 fluorescent colours, ensuring you have all the colours you need for your highlighting needs. The highlighters come in a fun dinosaur design, adding a touch of playfulness to your stationery collection.

title: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( TWIN PRETTY COLOUR )
subtitle: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( TWIN
overview: Our M&G Twin Pretty Colours is a highlighter with double tips which has a soft tip at one end and a chisel tip at the other end. The soft tip is designed for highlighting or underlining small text, while the chisel tip is ideal for broad strokes and highlighting larger areas. This dual-tip design offers greater versatility and precision when highlighting or marking text in various sizes and styles.

title: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( POINT LINER PASTEL )
subtitle: M&G HIGHLIGHTER ( POINT
overview: Our M&G Point Liner highlighter is a pocket-sized tool that now comes in six beautiful pastel colours, perfect for making your notes and documents stand out. The chisel tip allows for broad highlighting or fine underlining, while the quick-drying, non-toxic ink ensures that there is no smudging. The highlighter also features a convenient clip, making it easy to attach to your notebook or pocket. Overall, this highlighter is a versatile and practical tool for anyone who needs to highlight or underline important information on the go.

title: M&G " SO MANY CATS " MINI FRUIT SCENTED HIGHLIGHTER (6PCS/SET)
subtitle: M&G " SO MANY
overview: Discover the M&G "SO MANY CATS" Mini Fruit Scented Highlighter Set - a cute and compact 6-piece collection of mini highlighter pens. Choose from vibrant Fluorescent or soothing Pastel colors, each with a delightful fruity scent like Strawberry, Banana, Blueberry, Grape, Melon, and Orange. Perfect for kids and students, these mini highlighters feature the popular "SO MANY CATS" design and are available in Blue, Pink, Purple, Yellow, Green, and Orange. Make your notes fun and fragrant with this globally popular M&G Highlighter set.

title: M&G HI-LINER HIGHLIGHTER ( CHISEL TIP )
subtitle: M&G HI-LINER HIGHLIGHTER (
overview: Elevate your highlighting experience with the M&G Hi-Liner Series Highlighter, featuring six vivid fluorescent colors that add vibrancy to your notes and documents. With its chisel tip, this highlighter offers two line widths, catering to both precise fine and broad highlighting needs. The slim and easy-to-grip barrel ensures comfortable handling, making it a must-have for students, professionals, and anyone on the go. Plus, its sleek design makes it easy to slip into your pencil case for convenient portability. Highlights: Six Vibrant Fluorescent Colors: yellow, green, orange, pink, purple, and blue for standout highlights. Chisel Tip Design: Offers precision for detailed highlighting and broad strokes for emphasis. Versatile Line Widths: Features two line widths for customizable highlighting options.
